productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Plaid Blue Shirt
description: CompositionWhite plaid shirt made of 100% organic cotton with full sleeves,  with blue and black accents and white stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar with appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on the left chest with white thread detailing and embroidered logo, full length button placket and curved hemlineFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash dark colours separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron Dry cleanable Head out in style in this plaid shirt from timberland. With an attractive color combination and made of organic cotton, you will look smart and feel fresh at the same time. Team the shirt with jeans or cargos and casual shoes for a perfectly laidback look. This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon FootprintModel statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
